briefs.title: Lottery Marketing Rules for BC Gaming Retailers Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: BC has created new rules governing how lottery schemes can be marketed, advertised, and promoted, including restrictions on direct marketing (reaching customers by mail, email, text, or social media) and the use of inducements (bonuses or rewards offered to encourage play).
briefs.action_required: Review your lottery marketing practices now to ensure they comply before the April 13, 2026 effective date.

key_dates.label: BC Lottery Scheme Marketing, Advertising and Promotion Regulation takes effect
